vendor/symfony/error-handler/Internal/TentativeTypes.php (1,627 lines of code) (raw):

<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was
